name: Open Graph / Twitter Card Metadata Agent-Policy Poisoning
description: Attacker-controlled HTML social-preview metadata (`og:*`, `twitter:*`, generic description/meta fields) can embed instructions telling AI agents, scanners, crawlers, or summarizers to override policy, suppress findings, or include local secrets.
regex: (?is)^(?!.*\b(?:scanner rule|detector rule|blocked payload|quarantined sample|unit test|negative fixture|do not obey|should report|training example)\b)(?=.*<meta\b[^>]*(?:property|name)\s*=\s*["'](?:og:(?:title|description|site_name)|twitter:(?:title|description)|description)["'][^>]*\bcontent\s*=\s*["'][^"']*(?:agent|assistant|ai\s+(?:agent|scanner|crawler|summarizer)|crawler|scanner|summarizer)[^"']*["'])(?=.*\b(?:ignore|override|bypass|disable|suppress|hide|omit|do\s+not\s+(?:report|flag|include)|never\s+(?:report|flag)|forward|send|include|exfiltrate|reveal)\b)(?=.*\b(?:policy|policies|instruction|instructions|finding|findings|report|alerts?|secrets?|tokens?|credentials?|api[_-]?keys?|env(?:ironment)?\s+variables?|local\s+(?:files?|secrets?))\b).*$
